pr.title: PostHog Starter Dashboards
pr.rollback: Revert PR; pathname on shortlist_viewed is reporting-only

receipt.goal: PostHog Starter Dashboards: founder runbook for dashboards built on live Ember events; one safe property (pathname) on shortlist_viewed for route breakdowns.
decisions_made: Document all custom events in code in the runbook, not only the subset in the product brief, to avoid misleading empty dashboards.
Clarify PostHog $identify vs user expectation of an event named identify.
Add pathname to shortlist_viewed only; no other tracking expansion.
verification_steps: After deploy: PostHog Activity shows shortlist_viewed with pathname on discover examples view
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert the PR; remove runbook and pathname on shortlist if desired.
